attractions.name: Eagle's Square (Datarang Lang)
attractions.description: Iconic landmark with massive eagle statue and waterfront area perfect for leisurely stroll and photos
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/All Inclusive Guide for Langkawi.pdf

attractions.name: Al-Hana Mosque
attractions.description: Prominent mosque with beautiful architecture, great place to appreciate local Islamic culture
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/All Inclusive Guide for Langkawi.pdf

attractions.name: Taman Lagenda Park
attractions.description: Relaxing park with sculptures and displays showcasing Langkawi's myths and legends
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/All Inclusive Guide for Langkawi.pdf

local_dishes.name: Roti Canai
local_dishes.description: A flaky, buttery flatbread served with dhal (lentil curry) or other vegetarian sauces. Classic Malaysian breakfast or snack
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/All Inclusive Guide for Langkawi.pdf

local_dishes.name: Murtabak
local_dishes.description: A stuffed pancake that can be made with vegetarian fillings like vegetables, onions, and eggs. There are chicken versions too
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/All Inclusive Guide for Langkawi.pdf

local_dishes.name: Mee Goreng
local_dishes.description: Fried noodles that can be made vegetarian by requesting no meat or seafood
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/All Inclusive Guide for Langkawi.pdf

local_dishes.name: Nasi Goreng
local_dishes.description: Fried rice that can be made vegetarian by requesting no meat or seafood
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/All Inclusive Guide for Langkawi.pdf

local_dishes.name: Nasi Ayam
local_dishes.description: Malaysian favorite chicken rice, consists of fragrant rice cooked with chicken broth, served with roasted or steamed chicken
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/All Inclusive Guide for Langkawi.pdf

local_dishes.name: Chicken Satay
local_dishes.description: Grilled chicken skewers served with peanut sauce
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/All Inclusive Guide for Langkawi.pdf

local_dishes.name: Ikan Goreng
local_dishes.description: Fried fish, available at many restaurants especially seafood restaurants
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/All Inclusive Guide for Langkawi.pdf

local_dishes.name: Asam Pedas
local_dishes.description: A sour and spicy fish stew, a popular Malay dish
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/All Inclusive Guide for Langkawi.pdf
